description: Create a Talon voice module in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\git_voice\ to enable voice-activated Git branch management for the repository located at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\test_repo. The module must consist of two files: git.py and git.talon. The Python component must define a user.git_branch list and a user.update_git_branches() action that retrieves branch names via git branch --format="%(refname:short)", converts them into spoken forms by replacing slashes, dashes, and underscores with spaces, and populates the Talon list. The Talon file must implement voice commands for "git update branches", "git checkout {user.git_branch}", "git status", "git add all", and "git commit <user.text>", ensuring each command executes the corresponding Git operation in the terminal.
